name: GeneLM
description: GeneLM is a genomic language model for bacterial coding sequence prediction and TIS refinement. It matters because it expands Moroccan bioinformatics work in modern AI methods for genomics.

name: MegaPlantTF
description: MegaPlantTF is a machine learning framework and web server for plant transcription factor identification. It matters because plant bioinformatics tools can support Moroccan research capacity in genomics and agriculture-related life sciences.

name: ClimateFiller
description: ClimateFiller is a Python framework for climate time-series quality control and gap filling. It matters because reliable climate data pipelines are important for Moroccan and African environmental analytics.
